instruction: Write a message of 25 words or more.

questions.question: Write a message to your friend about going to the cinema tonight. Include: what film, what time, where to meet.
questions.answer: Hi! Do you want to go to the cinema tonight? There's a new action film at 7pm. Let's meet at the entrance at 6:45. Let me know!
questions.explanation: A suitable message includes all three points: film, time, and meeting place.

questions.question: Write a message to your classmate about a study group. Include: when, where, what to study.
questions.answer: Hi! Shall we start a study group? We could meet at the library tomorrow at 4pm to practice English together. Let me know if that works for you!
questions.explanation: A good response covers all three elements: time, location, and subject.

questions.question: Write a message to your parent about staying at a friend's house. Include: which friend, when, what time you'll be back.
questions.answer: Mum, can I stay at Tom's house after school today? We'll study together and I'll be back by 8pm. Is that okay? Thanks!
questions.explanation: The message clearly states which friend, the duration, and return time.
